# "Auroral Displays of Divine Glory"
## Scripture
"The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands." - Psalm 19:1

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the breathtaking display of the northern lights, we are reminded of God's awe-inspiring glory. The dancing colors and swirling patterns of the aurora borealis are a testament to the divine craftsmanship that underlies all of creation. Just as the northern lights illuminate the night sky, God's glory shines forth in the darkness, illuminating our path and guiding us towards Him. The ever-changing spectacle of the northern lights also speaks to the dynamic and relational nature of God, who is always moving and working in our lives.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the beauty of the northern lights, we are humbled by the vastness and complexity of Your creation. Help us to see Your glory displayed not just in the celestial wonders, but also in the everyday moments of our lives. May we be filled with a sense of awe and wonder as we contemplate Your majesty, and may our hearts be drawn to You in worship and adoration. Illuminate our paths, guide us through life's challenges, and reveal Your glory to us, that we may proclaim Your greatness to all. Amen.
